description_long: This is a modern outdoor-style couch constructed from a wooden pallet base with a simple, rectangular form. The seat and backrest are fitted with thick, plain gray cushions that appear to be loose and removable. The wooden frame is exposed, showing the slatted structure typical of repurposed pallet furniture, and the wood has a natural finish. The couch has no visible armrests, giving it an open and accessible appearance from the sides. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the width of the seat and providing uniform support. This design is practical for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces, blending utilitarian materials with comfort.
description: A pallet-style wooden couch with thick gray cushions and an open, armless design. The exposed wood frame and simple, modern look make it suitable for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the couch, three seat cushions, and the straight backrest with exposed wooden pallet base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted wooden back structure and the continuous backrest cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open side profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, rectangular seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion, all plain and unadorned, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: No distinct legs; the couch sits directly on a blocky, exposed wooden pallet base that raises it slightly off the ground.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests present; sides are open and unobstructed, emphasizing accessibility.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous, and cushioned backrest attached to the wooden frame, matching the width of the seat and providing uniform support.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
